description: This file provides utility functions to generate versioned HTML attributes for including Bootstrap CSS and JS files, with environment-specific modifications such as minification and integrity hashes.

methods.name: getVersionedBsCssProps
methods.description: Generates HTML link attributes for including Bootstrap CSS with versioning, environment-specific minification, and optional integrity hash based on text direction.

methods.name: getVersionedBsJsProps
methods.description: Generates HTML script attributes for including Bootstrap JS bundle with versioning, environment-specific minification, and integrity hash.
